content.speakerText: Looks like a hardware issue. I'll send a tech to your desk.
content.speakerTextCn: 看起来是硬件问题，我派技术员去你工位。

options.text: Can you come at 2 PM? I'm free then.
Can you fix it over the phone?

content.explanation: 正确答案是主动提供可用时间段，符合场景中‘提高沟通效率’的要求。选项2直接拒绝服务，不符合职场协作语境；选项3询问远程解决，但对话已明确需上门维修；选项4虽合理，但属于被动提问，未主动提供时间，效率较低。

content.speakerText: Tech will be there at 3:30. Should take under an hour.
content.speakerTextCn: 技术员3点半到，一小时内能搞定。

options.text: Perfect, I'll be here. Thanks a lot!
Can you reschedule? I have another meeting.
I'll be out of the office.

content.explanation: 正确答案是对确认时间的积极回应，包含感谢，符合‘表达感谢或说明准备动作’的要求。选项2试图改期，但对话已确认时间，不应再质疑；选项3询问费用，但IT维修通常不收费；选项4表示不在场，与服务需求冲突。

content.speakerText: We've scheduled your repair for tomorrow at 10:00. Is that still convenient?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们已为您安排了明天10点的维修，这个时间还方便吗？

options.text: Yes, that works for me. I'll have everything ready.
I'm not sure. Maybe next week?

content.explanation: 正确答案是积极确认并说明准备动作，符合场景核心表达。选项2拒绝时间但未提供替代方案，显得不合作；选项3无理由要求换人，不符合职场沟通规范；选项4虽相关，但未回应时间确认，偏离核心任务。

content.template: I'd like ___ book a repair for my computer. Are you available this afternoon?
content.hint: 表达‘想要做某事’的固定句型
content.knowledgePoint: would like to do（预约/请求服务核心句型）

content.template: I'll ___ the laptop on the desk for the technician.
content.hint: 表示‘把设备放在某处，方便技术人员取用’的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（leave something somewhere，服务场景惯用表达）

content.template: Could you please ___ me when the technician is on the way?
content.hint: 在服务场景中，礼貌请求对方在服务人员出发时告知你的动词
content.knowledgePoint: 服务场景高频动词（notify = 正式通知）

content.speakerText: Looks like a hardware issue. I'll send a tech to your desk.
content.speakerTextCn: 看起来是硬件问题，我派技术员去你工位。
expectedAnswers: Can I schedule it for after 3 PM? I'm in a meeting until then.
Would it be possible to come this afternoon? I'm free after 3.
Could the tech come tomorrow? I have a conference today.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否主动提供可用时间段，而非仅被动接受
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的礼貌表达（could/would it be possible）
表达自然度：符合职场口语习惯，语气礼貌不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了 schedule, afternoon, meeting, tech 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Tech will be there at 3:30. Should take under an hour.
content.speakerTextCn: 技术员3点半到，一小时内能搞定。
expectedAnswers: Great, I'll make sure the laptop is ready and cleared off the desk.
Thanks! I'll stay around so I can answer any questions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否确认时间并表达感谢或说明准备动作
语言准确性：使用了正确动词搭配（make sure, stay around, appreciate）
表达自然度：语气积极、符合职场礼貌规范，无生硬或命令式表达
关键词覆盖：使用了 laptop, desk, appreciate, help 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: We've scheduled your repair for tomorrow at 10:00. Is that still convenient?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们已为您安排了明天10点的维修，这个时间还方便吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, 10 AM works perfectly. I'll have everything prepared.
That's fine, thanks for scheduling it so quickly.
Actually, could we move it to 11? I have a short call at 10.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应时间安排，必要时礼貌提出调整
语言准确性：使用了恰当的时态和礼貌请求结构（could we move）
表达自然度：语气自然，符合职场沟通习惯，无过度简略或生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了 schedule, time, prepared, move, thanks 等核心词汇
